channel.title: Home on Awesome Hugo blog
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Awesome Hugo blog

item.title: Projects
item.description: Insights Into Ransomware Extracted structured information from unstructured text data related to ransomware negotiations using a LLM and applied exploratory and natural language processing methods to obtain meaningful insights. Analyzed quantitative information on global ransomware attacks across multiple industries and ransomware strains. Topic Modeling in Customer Feedback: Insights from Comcast Complaints Examined consumer complaints about Comcast using a data set spanning from 2000-2016 Analysis and Classification of Tor Network Traffic Analyzed data and built a model to classify Tor traffic with using data collected by the Canadian Institute for Cybersecurity

item.title: About
item.description: Education Master of Science in Applied Statistics Skills Technical Skills Tools Languages Python scikit-learn English R NumPy Italian SQL SciPy Data Science matplotlib Machine Learning seaborn Statistics plotly-dash HTML/CSS Django LaTeX Flask Git/GitHub Dataiku JMP Minitab RStudio Jupyter notebooks Tableau Power BI
